questions.question_text: Write short notes on the following for 5 marks each. Importance of Communication Skills Paralinguistics Team behaviour in a Group Discussion Email etiquette CO Mapping
Discuss the functions of communication in your own words. Also throw light on the Organizational barriers with examples.
What do you understand by Language sensitivity? Discuss with specific examples pertaining to race, gender and disability. CO Mapping
Clarify the importance of following the right Netiquette as an undergraduate student with relevant examples.
What are the most common barriers of Listening and how according to you they can be removed? Elaborate with examples. CO Mapping
What are the Do’s and Don’ts of participating effectively in a Group Discussion?
Draft a suitable resume to apply for the post of Summer Intern, assuming that you have completed your B.Tech. First Year. Invent the necessary details CO Mapping
Assuming that you are the Purchase Officer at IGDTUW, write a letter to Ecosys Pvt. Ltd to enquire about the price of 150 Computers that you need to buy for IGDTUW. Invent the necessary details.

Write 4 paragraphs of 5 sentences each on the topic My experiences of studying in an all girls University ,keeping in mind the nuances of effective paragraph writing. Underline the topic and conclusion sentences.
